programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression. The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop.

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 4th Album 'DREAMSCAPE' Playlist
programme.desc: 5. No Escape NCT DREAM's 4th full-length album 「DREAMSCAPE」 follows their previous release 「DREAM( )SCAPE」, portraying the group's second journey as they break away from a dark, desensitized reality in search of an ideal dreamlike space. 1. INTRO : DREAMSCAPE 4. i hate fruits 3. Flying Kiss The title 「DREAMSCAPE」 signifies a long-awaited, dreamlike landscape and world, capturing the excitement and freedom of youth within this utopian realm. Across 11 tracks, a dynamic storyline unfolds like a fairytale, vividly portraying the radiant moments of youth in a dramatic way. 7. YOU 8. Heavenly 11. Rains in Heaven6. Best of Me 2. When I'm With You 9. Night Poem [Track List] 10. Off The Wall

programme.title: After School Club: PURPLE KISS Ep.536
programme.desc: Being themselves no matter what people say, PURPLE KISS!We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!PURPLE KISS is back with their confident new song ‘Nerdy', and they are coming to ASC.Far apart, but together in heart!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Korea's ballad prince Jung Seung Hwan! Jung Seung Hwan known for his signature suave and captivating voice released his first physical album in two years — an EP titled Five Words Left Unsaid. The album is full of heartrending ballads that show off the artist's prowess including the lead single We From The First. It is about a man who develops romantic feelings for a close friend but is unable to express himself and quietly suffers alone. The album also features a song written by IU Love Letter which is known to be the first song she gave to another artist. The ballad prince is here on I'm LIVE once again to impress everyone with a brand new setlist including We From The First Voice Walking into the forest and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and let the artist melt your soul!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is JANNABI! JANNABI brought a huge retro sensation to Korea's music scene upon their debut in 2014. Since then the band has developed their unique retro vibe in both music and fashion. The band is back with its third full-length album The Land of Fantasy to nourish our souls once again. Through its 13 tracks all written by CHOI JUNG HOON with the help of guitarist KIM DO HYUNG this land of fantasy beautifully captures hope love courage and friendship. Just like their previous releases the new album provides an eclectic yet coherent collection of folk-rock ballads and playful pop-infused melodies but with greater depth and beauty. In this episode JANNABI performs A Ballad of Non Le Jon Confession Show The King of Romance Time I Know Where The Rainbow has Fallen and Bluebird Spread your wings! Tune in to I'm LIVE and enjoy their new songs live!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Damons year! This artist started his career as a musician in 2017 with the song Couldn't Sleep. Since then he has mesmerized listeners with his heartwarming melodies and sentiments. Also known for his poetic lyrics like I will hold your hands you can just relax It was like an ice burn Then one light came into my blurry eyes it reached its hand out and lifted me up he presents music that suits all 365 days and 12 months of the year just like his stage name Damons year (day month year). In this episode he performs Rainbow ai Cherry Your Knight yours and Pattern to showcase the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented musician!

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.476

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Korea's ballad prince Jung Seung Hwan! Jung Seung Hwan known for his signature suave and captivating voice released his first physical album in two years — an EP titled Five Words Left Unsaid. The album is full of heartrending ballads that show off the artist's prowess including the lead single We From The First. It is about a man who develops romantic feelings for a close friend but is unable to express himself and quietly suffers alone. The album also features a song written by IU Love Letter which is known to be the first song she gave to another artist. The ballad prince is here on I'm LIVE once again to impress everyone with a brand new setlist including We From The First Voice Walking into the forest and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and let the artist melt your soul!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is JANNABI! JANNABI brought a huge retro sensation to Korea's music scene upon their debut in 2014. Since then the band has developed their unique retro vibe in both music and fashion. The band is back with its third full-length album The Land of Fantasy to nourish our souls once again. Through its 13 tracks all written by CHOI JUNG HOON with the help of guitarist KIM DO HYUNG this land of fantasy beautifully captures hope love courage and friendship. Just like their previous releases the new album provides an eclectic yet coherent collection of folk-rock ballads and playful pop-infused melodies but with greater depth and beauty. In this episode JANNABI performs A Ballad of Non Le Jon Confession Show The King of Romance Time I Know Where The Rainbow has Fallen and Bluebird Spread your wings! Tune in to I'm LIVE and enjoy their new songs live!

programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion. (S1 E01)

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A uniquely emotional documentary that will touch the heart of audiences around the world. Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Journalists from all over the world present immersive coverage of relevant news stories each story is extensively researched, and is recounted by acclaimed journalists as well as the people who are living the story.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Fake permits, undercover informants and millions of dollars are involved a US government agency works to prove suppliers to research labs import wild monkeys from Cambodia with false paperwork.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: A police raid in a small Philippine town reveals a young mayor's alleged links to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bride of the Century
programme.desc: Taeyang Group Is The Largest Conglomerate In South Korea, But The Choi Family, Who Runs Taeyang, Has Supposedly Been Under A Hundred-Year Curse - The First Bride Of The Eldest Son Will Always Die. Choi Gang Ju, The Current Heir To Taeyang Group, Had Been Arranged To Marry Heiress Jang I Gyeong When She Suddenly Disappears.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.desc: Guest In The Newsroom | In this episode, senior journalist Neerja Chowdhury shares rare stories from covering 12 Prime Ministers and witnessing power for over five decades. She discusses Modi vs Rahul Gandhi, Congress' missed chances, BJP dynamics, and untold political and parliamentary moments.

programme.title: Kitabwala
programme.desc: On Kitabwala, we explore Operation SINDOOR, India's decisive response to a deadly terror attack in Pahalgam's Baisaran Valley. Discover the courage, strategy, and valor of Indian soldiers.

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: Rakhwale | in this episode, NSG commando Tushar Joshi recalls the 2002 Akshardham terror attack and the 14-hour Operation Vajra Shakti. A rare, first-hand account of strategy, sacrifice, and saving innocent lives.

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: Today on the LT show, Siddhant breaks down a viral AI debate sparked by Hyperwrite AI CEO Matt Shumer's essay, and what the real-world risks look like. Also: a USTR map controversy involving PoK/Aksai Chin, and Bangladesh's election landslide for BNP.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: BNP swept Bangladesh's parliamentary election, returning to power after nearly 20 years and putting Tarique Rahman in the spotlight as the likely next prime minister. We break down what drove the win, Tarique's key promises, and what it could mean for India.

programme.title: Kharcha Pani
programme.desc: On February 12, bank unions and trade unions have called for a nationwide strike and Bharat Bandh, which may affect banking services across India. In this video, we explain why the strike is happening and also break down the latest unemployment data and job trends.

programme.title: Social List
programme.desc: Rajpal Yadav has surrendered in the cheque bounce case after the Delhi High Court refused to extend the deadline to deposit the money. After he said he has no friends in Bollywood, many people came forward to support him, while some on social media made memes.

programme.title: Sehat
programme.desc: In today's show, we talk about hard vs soft belly fat and why it can be a health warning, a tragic death of a 12-year-old girl due to severe lice infestation, and reports of coliform bacteria found in some milk brands. Experts explain the health risks and how you can stay safe.

programme.title: The Cinema Show
programme.desc: In this episode of The Cinema Show, we talk about the changes Rajnath Singh has suggested in Salman Khan's film Battle of Galwan. We also share updates on Dhurandhar 2 and the sequels of 3 Idiots and Munna Bhai.

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: A meeting between AIMIM leaders and an SP Muslim leader has created political tension in Uttar Pradesh, and Akhilesh Yadav expelled the leader within a day. This video explains how Owaisi's AIMIM is trying to grow in UP and why SP feels threatened.

programme.title: Param Anand
programme.desc: In this episode of Param Anand, Gajendra Singh Bhati recommends films and series that reveal how intelligence agencies shape global power. The picks explore covert operations, regime change, and behind-the-scenes politics through cinema.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Taxi Bean

ABHIJAN
programme.desc: A proud taxi driver faces moral dilemmas crime and love ultimately finding redemption and true love with kind/hearted Gulabi.

programme.title: HASHI SUDHU HASHI NOY
programme.desc: "Hasi Sudhu Hasi Noy" is a comedy and satire about a man training to be a thief, exploring love and societal frauds.

programme.title: 365 : Repeat the Year Ep.12
programme.desc: Shin, who has been resetting alongside No-seop, grows increasingly anxious as the time of his daughter's death draws near.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.1
programme.desc: Meteorites fall on Hanyang, breaking the palace's barrier and allowing ghosts (gwimul) to invade. They attack Prince Lee Rin, who falls mysteriously ill. King Haejong learns the only cure is the 'Millennium Flower' and departs for Mount Baekdu to find it.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.2
programme.desc: While trying to save 'Yeon Ha', the only Mago tribeswoman who can bloom the flower, Haejong is ensnared by Sadam's magic. Succumbing to madness, King Haejong brings great tragedy to the palace.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.3
programme.desc: The ghost trio (Fat Minister, Attendant Song, and Rang) crosses the Samdo River (river to the underworld) and lingers around Lee Rin. Meanwhile, King Kisan is unable to sleep due to Sadam's spell.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.4
programme.desc: Lee Rin offers a hand to Do Ha, who is in a cage, but she immediately throws him over her shoulder. Meanwhile, Park Soo Jong plans to appoint Lee Rin as the Director (Jejo) of Sogyukseo.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.5
programme.desc: Kisan draws his sword on Lee Rin, accusing him of lying about his ability to see ghosts. Meanwhile, Sadam identifies Do Ha as a shaman of the Hae-wol, Hae-il, and Hae-si, and brings her before Kisan.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.6
programme.desc: Lee Rin, clinging to a narrow ledge on a cliff, is pulled up to safety by Do Ha. The ghost trio tells Lee Rin and Do Ha to flee while they lure away the military officers.

programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: The Seagull Invasion
programme.desc: Jane and Jerry try to shoo the seagull out of the house, but it continues to flyaround, causing more chaos. The seagull starts to take over the house, making itselfat home and pus_hing Jane and Jerry out.The two siblings come up with a plan totake back their home

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle's nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety.

programme.desc: When a con artist purchases Nicky's granny's house for a fake gemstone necklace, the SECRET LAB KIDS must learn about minerals in order to save granny from ruin.

programme.title: Fashion Genes
programme.desc: In order to have the best girl modeling her designs, Nicky decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Amusement park

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 22
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Squad 2 Ep 42
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is a team of four: Bablu, Dablu, Lakha and Neva. They are the town's guardians, patrolling the forest and helping residents in need. Together, they overcome many challenges, interact with lots of different characters and help their friends break their bad habits.

To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot

programme.title: LMN' s

Chip, thanks to his book, discovers that the volcano emitted a base when mixed with the acid may neutralize and make the dangerous lake in a nice extension of salt water.

programme.title: LMN' s
programme.desc: Across a hot desert Chip and the atoms found themselves with a tungsten atom that gives them refuge under a pyramid-shaped building that, until recently, had an ingenious cooling system through which flowed a stream of ammonia in its basement. But now, Dr. No has diverted the flow of ammonia for his own benefit. Chip discovers the point where ammonia diverts and builds a dam that returns to its normal course.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.desc: A legendary catch! Coyote reels in a 300-pound river monster and showcases the sheer strength and survival of this freshwater beast.This slime isn't alien—it's animal. But which one made it? Coyote follows the trail to uncover a gooey mystery.

programme.title: Yuck! What Creature Made This Slime?!
programme.desc: Mystery slime appears on the forest floor—what creature left it behind? The team investigates this sticky situation.As part of #CampYouTube, Mark builds a tide pool aquarium and fills it with sea creatures from the coast—perfect for learning from home.

programme.title: For the Love of Wolves!
programme.desc: Wolves need our help. Coyote partners with conservationists to share the story of these vital predators and how to support their future.

programme.title: Caught! Dangerous, Blue, & Bloated!
programme.desc: Coyote pulls up a strange, bloated blue creature from the water. Is it dangerous or just misunderstood? The team investigates.Coyote faces the GIANT silk caterpillar, whose spiny body delivers a nasty sting. Pain, science, and stunning slow-motion footage await.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Snapped by World's Fastest Jaws!
programme.desc: Mark demonstrates the power of nature's fastest jaws—those of the trap-jaw ant. The slow-motion footage is as impressive as the speed.What's a mud dauber wasp? A surprisingly painful stinger! Mark shows how this lesser-known species defends its nest.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)
programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Challenge – Will It Sting?!
programme.desc: The ultimate challenge—Coyote revisits the infamous bullet ant to find out if the sting is truly as bad as legends say. Pain scale off the charts.Did Coyote really find a dinosaur? He uncovers a bizarre modern-day creature that looks like it crawled straight out of the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Ultimate Frog Scavenger Hunt!
programme.desc: Can Coyote catch every frog species in one day? This amphibian-packed episode follows a wild scavenger hunt in a lush ecosystem.A tiny puppy is covered in ticks. Coyote and team work quickly to remove them and explain the dangers of tick-borne illnesses.

programme.title: 24Hr Snake Hunt – The Clock Is Ticking!
programme.desc: One full day, one big mission—find a rare snake. Coyote races the clock to locate and document an elusive species before time runs out.Flying bullet ants sound bad—and they are. Mark takes on this airborne nightmare in a high-flying, high-pain sting test.

programme.title: Stung and Bit! Bullet Ant vs. Soldier Ant
programme.desc: What's worse—bitten or stung? Mark tests both by taking a bullet ant sting and a soldier ant bite back to back.Would you drink a smoothie made from puke fruit? Coyote samples this notoriously disgusting treat in the name of curiosity and culture.

programme.title: Frog Scavenger Hunt! – Can I Catch Them All?
programme.desc: How many frog species can Coyote catch in one day? This scavenger hunt is a race against time and terrain across wetlands and forests.Costa Rica's most dangerous pit viper is milked for venom in this nerve-racking episode. Coyote shows the precision it takes to stay safe.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: This week, Melvyn stops over in Hanoi, Vietnam. The capital of the nation, Hanoi boasts more than 1000 years of history. Along with that, comes a long-standing history of traditional cuisine with many famous delicacies. Melvyn visits a Vietnamese rice farmer, where he experiences a typical Vietnamese home cooking. Then he hangs out with a culinary artisan who has been living in the city for many generations and learns what it takes to cook an authentic Hanoi cuisine.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?
